package.name: FreeCAD Agentic
package.description: Embed Claude inside FreeCAD as a dockable chat panel. Talk to Claude in the same window as the 3D view; Claude can read, create, and parametrically edit the active document (sketches, constraints, pads, pockets, expressions) using FreeCAD's own Python API. Every action is wrapped in a single undo-able transaction, so one Ctrl-Z reverts one Claude action.
package.author: Kobe Neilson

workbench.name: Agentic
workbench.description: Chat with Claude to create and edit parametric models.
